name: Insurance Desk – Funnel 1 (Meta Lead → Trial Activation)
description: 5-day WhatsApp automation funnel — faithful build of Insurance-Desk-Funnel1-BUILD-SPEC.md. Day 0 entry through Day 5 final offer, all 3 Day-1 branches, Day-1B no-reply nudge, interest personalization, objection handling, tag-triggered lead scoring, and hot/warm/cold grading. Environment-specific values are wrapped in __DOUBLE_UNDERSCORES__ and must be replaced before going live.

nodes.name: Automation Entry
nodes.description: Spec step 1 — Trigger: New Meta Lead Form / First Message

nodes.name: Save Response → Lead Capture
nodes.description: Spec step 4 — capture: Name, Phone, Meta Campaign ID, Lead Time

nodes.name: Google Sheets → Add Row
nodes.description: Spec step 5 — Columns: Name | Phone | Source | Date | Stage=Day0. Upsert-by-Phone prevents duplicate lead rows.

nodes.name: Call to Action → Start Free Trial
nodes.description: Spec step 8 — Button: Start Free Trial, Link: trial signup URL

parameters.text: Ready when you are — start your free trial in under a minute. 👇

parameters.message_template:
Hi {{Name}}, can I ask you one simple question?
How many policy renewals do you think you miss every month?
Even missing just a few can cost thousands in commission every year. Insurance Desk tracks every renewal automatically. 👇
Tell us about your business.

nodes.name: Quick Reply → Pain Level
nodes.description: Spec step 14 — 3 buttons: Rarely Miss | Sometimes Miss | Frequently Miss

parameters.message_template: 👇 Pick the one that fits you best:

Thank you. Most insurance advisors don't lose business to competition — they lose it because renewals are forgotten. Insurance Desk helps you organize customers and automate renewals. What would you like to do next?

nodes.name: BRANCH 2 · Logic Control → Slot No Reply?
nodes.description: Guard: no slot reply within 12h → END (spec leaves Branch-2 timeout undefined; ending prevents a dead wait).

nodes.description: Spec B2.4 — use preferred_slot to set time window

parameters.description: Live demo booked via WhatsApp funnel. Contact: {{senderNumber}}. Preferred slot: {{preferred_slot}}.

nodes.description: Spec B2.6 — Update row: Stage=Demo Booked, Slot, Rep=unassigned

nodes.name: BRANCH 2 · Assign Chatbot → Sales Team queue
BRANCH 2 · Assign Tag → SALES_OWNED
nodes.description: Marks lead as owned by Sales so later EXIT CHECKs stop nurturing.

parameters.message_template:
Perfect! Your demo is booked for {{preferred_slot}}.
Our team will call/join shortly before. See you then!

parameters.message_template: Stop typing policy details manually. Insurance Desk reads your policy PDF and auto-fills everything in seconds. Try it free 👇
Never lose a renewal again. Insurance Desk auto-reminds you and your client before every due date. See it in action 👇
Give your clients their own app to view policies, renewals & documents — under your brand. Try Insurance Desk free 👇
One dashboard for every lead, client and policy — no more scattered Excel sheets. Start your free trial 👇
Insurance Desk gives you AI Policy Entry, Renewal Reminders, a branded Customer App, and full Client Management — all in one place. Try it free 👇

parameters.message_template: Insurance Desk starts at less than the cost of one missed renewal commission. Try it free for 7 days, no card needed.
Setup takes under 10 minutes. Our AI does the data entry for you — most agents are up and running same day.
Try it free with your own leads for a week — you'll see the difference in how organized your pipeline feels.
